assertionResults.title: returns JSON for a successful handler

assertionResults.title: serializes an ApiErrorException to its envelope + status

assertionResults.title: maps a bad request to a 400 envelope

assertionResults.title: coerces an unexpected error to a 500 envelope

assertionResults.title: parses and coerces a valid query

assertionResults.fullName: parseSignalsQuery treats empty-string filters as absent (the "All" selection)
assertionResults.title: treats empty-string filters as absent (the "All" selection)

assertionResults.title: accepts URLSearchParams directly

assertionResults.title: throws a typed bad_request for an invalid enum value

assertionResults.title: rejects an out-of-range pageSize

assertionResults.title: parses incident filters

assertionResults.title: rejects an invalid status

assertionResults.title: filters incidents by status

assertionResults.title: combines status + impact filters

assertionResults.title: orders newest first and paginates stably

assertionResults.title: filters by severity against the full 10k dataset

assertionResults.fullName: querySignals — filtering combines filters (AND)
assertionResults.title: combines filters (AND)

assertionResults.title: returns an empty page (no error) when nothing matches

assertionResults.title: paginates without overlap and covers every row exactly once

assertionResults.title: is deterministic — same query yields the same order

assertionResults.title: clamps an out-of-range page instead of returning garbage

assertionResults.title: keeps confidence === null through query + detail (never coerced)

assertionResults.title: throws a typed not_found error for an unknown signal

assertionResults.title: returns a real signal detail with linked incident or null
